display_text: Dormant Curio, Tier 1: Neutral artifact that amplifies the next neutral artifact you craft. While equipped, the potency (stat bonuses) of the next neutral artifact you find and upgrade is increased by 30%. Does not affect cooldowns, mana costs, or cast ranges. Stats: Potency Increase: 30%.
